prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: # 主角形象生成提示词

**Full-body character design, male, standing centered, pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words, no letters, no watermark.**

**Character concept:** A male space station maintenance worker in a sci-fi redemption setting, philosophical and contemplative tone, ordinary-looking man with an air of existential weariness.

**Face and features:** Average-looking adult male, plain and unremarkable facial features, neither handsome nor unattractive, common face that blends into a crowd. Slightly gaunt cheeks with faint dark circles under eyes suggesting chronic fatigue and long shifts in artificial lighting. Medium-set eyes with a muted gray-brown iris color, dull but carrying a flicker of buried curiosity. Straight nose of average proportion, thin neutral lips, light stubble on jaw and chin — unkempt but not wild. Skin tone is pale and sallow, the complexion of someone who has lived under fluorescent station lighting for years without natural sunlight. Facial contour line width 1.0px, sharpness 90%, eye dynamic highlight tracking with 85% reflectance.

**Hair:** Short-cropped dark brown hair, slightly uneven as if self-cut, with a few premature gray strands near the temples. Hair strands show subtle movement, strand sway amplitude 5-9cm, wind speed 0.8m/s, suggesting the faint recycled air currents of a space station corridor.

**Expression:** Distant, contemplative gaze directed slightly off-center, as if listening to something imperceptible — a faint resonance only he can hear. Mouth closed, jaw slightly tense, conveying quiet internal conflict and philosophical weight.

**Body and build:** Average build, neither muscular nor frail, the body of someone who performs routine physical labor but nothing extraordinary. Medium height, slightly rounded shoulders from years of hunching over maintenance panels in cramped corridors.

**Clothing:** Worn industrial maintenance jumpsuit in faded steel-blue and charcoal gray, with visible patching and micro-abrasions on the fabric. A utility harness across the torso with magnetic tool clips — a plasma welder holstered at the hip, a diagnostic scanner clipped to the chest strap. The jumpsuit collar is partially unzipped revealing a dark thermal underlayer. On the left shoulder, a faded station identification patch with an abstract circular emblem — the insignia of a deep-space waystation. Heavy-duty mag-lock boots in matte black, scuffed and dented. On the right forearm, a cracked holographic wrist-display emitting a faint cyan glow, showing indecipherable data streams. Thin protective gloves tucked into a belt loop, fingertips stained with machine grease.

**Atmospheric details and lighting:** Tyndall volumetric light beams (beam diameter 1.0px, intensity 0.8, color temperature 6200K) casting soft shafts of pale light across the figure as if filtering through a station viewport. Subtle particle effects — not cherry blossoms but instead tiny floating luminous motes resembling echo-core resonance particles (particle size 0.2-0.35px, brightness 0.9), drifting slowly around the character like suspended dust in zero-gravity, glowing faintly blue-white. Air perspective intensity 0.25 for atmospheric depth. Lens flare (intensity 0.3, diameter 3.2px) from a distant unseen light source.

**Color palette:** High-saturation transparent tones (saturation 82%, contrast 130:1). Dominant palette of cold steel blues, muted charcoal, desaturated cyan accents from holographic elements, and warm amber undertones in skin and lighting edges. Sky gradient from top RGB(102,187,255) to bottom RGB(255,242,224) with 100-level smooth transition on the white background's ambient wash.

**Camera and quality:** 4K HDR ultra-high definition, absolutely sharp and crystal clear for 16-inch display. Wide-angle establishing shot (focal length 20mm, FOV 90°) combined with portrait-level facial detail (85mm equivalent detail, f1.8 depth). Maximum sharpness, transparent air quality, every texture from fabric weave to skin pore rendered with clinical precision.

**Style direction:** Sci-fi philosophical concept art, liminal space atmosphere, the aesthetic of isolation and quiet revelation, evoking themes of cosmic loneliness and the possibility of transcendent purpose found in mundane existence. The character should feel like an everyman standing at the threshold of something vast and incomprehensible., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
